title: Image Carousel
author: @widlestudiollp
shortDescription: A modern image carousel component for Retool with animations, auto-play, navigation controls, and responsive UI.
longDescription: Image Carousel is a feature-rich Retool custom component that allows you to display images in an interactive and customizable carousel. It supports multiple animation styles, auto-play functionality, navigation positioning, and UI controls like dots and counters. Designed for performance and flexibility, it works seamlessly across devices and is ideal for dashboards, galleries, and media-rich applications.
